title: Detective Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Detective Evangelion             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed Oct 17, 2007 9:30 am Has anyone played this game on ps2? Or its psp version? http://www.play-asia.com/paOS-13-71-9f-49-en-70-1z2n.html I saw that game in Tokyo in an Akihabara store a few months ago, but I don't really know what it's like. It seems there are news evas and stuffs: Here's the official website: http://www.broccoli.co.jp/game/meitantei_eva/index.html I would gladly buy it if it's an interesting game, but I can't really find any review on internet.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Wed Oct 17, 2007 9:48 am I looked into this a while back. It's basically a game based on its name, where the plot is turned into some sort of rivalry-detective story between Shinji and Kaworu. If anyone does have a complete story synopsis, please tell us it. I've been wanting to know the complete story for a while. Also, what about the new EVA? What is it exactly?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 17, 2007 9:54 am Previous "Detective" topic: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=1556 Also, the new Eva: Reichu wrote: [url]http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=66177#66177[/url] It's called Eva Otsugata (乙型 = approximately "Type B", from what I can figure), and Kaworu uses it in "Detective".

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed Oct 17, 2007 11:13 am I see, thanks. Well, this game doesn't seem really interesting... I'll stay on evangelions :) I also have a ps2 game about Rei and Asuka, but I don't really know how to play it...

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Oct 17, 2007 11:36 am With the advent of rebuild the eva cashcow is bigger and fatter then ever. See Anno milk milk anno milk
